question: Does completed first-minute aggressor-volume imbalance at true UTC quarter-hour openings in four Binance USD-M perpetuals incrementally predict the next actionable 12-hour return relative to fixed shifted-boundary placebos and simple price-volume controls?

primary.effect: equal-weight mean across assets of per-asset OLS order-imbalance interquartile effect in basis points

inference.method: joint moving-block bootstrap with OLS refit

holdout_release_rule: Download evaluation only if every development predictive and 12 bp economic-relevance gate passes; download confirmation only if the unchanged evaluation gate passes. Never revise the rule after release.
known_exposure: Prior Halpha work viewed BNB/LINK prices in other questions and UNI/FIL spot daily returns only for 2025-07-21 through 2026-07-20. This question's 2021-2024 1m taker-buy proxy and outputs were not viewed before checkpoint.

FILUSDT-1m-2022-02.zip.observed_before_any_outcome_calculation: Official checksum-valid monthly archive ends at 2022-02-25 23:59 UTC and omits exactly 2022-02-26 through 2022-02-28 (4,320 bars).
FILUSDT-1m-2022-02.zip.repair: Append only the three matching official Binance daily 1m archives and their official checksums; require an exact full-month grid after append.
FILUSDT-1m-2022-02.zip.outcome_exposure: None; only timestamps, row counts, HTTP availability, byte sizes, and checksums were inspected before refreezing code.

FILUSDT-1m-2022-04.zip.observed_before_any_outcome_calculation: Official checksum-valid monthly archive starts at 2022-04-03 00:00 UTC and omits exactly 2022-04-01 through 2022-04-02 (2,880 bars).
FILUSDT-1m-2022-04.zip.repair: Append only the two matching official Binance daily 1m archives and their official checksums; require an exact full-month grid after append.
FILUSDT-1m-2022-04.zip.outcome_exposure: None; a timestamp-only scan of all 96 development month files found exactly the February and April gaps before any regression or outcome calculation.

search_disclosure: Four fixed assets; one primary configuration; four fixed phase-shift placebos; one 8h horizon; one 5m extra delay; exclusions for top-of-hour and funding openings; sign-only proxy; asset and year splits.
allowed_fixes_after_result_release: download retries and official checksum verification
parser fixes that do not reveal or change outcomes
corrections to an unambiguous implementation mismatch with this checkpoint while retaining all prior outputs and recording the change
forbidden_after_result_release: changing symbols, phases, boundary offsets, target, controls, costs, gates, or conclusion semantics
opening later phases after a failed gate
renaming a predictive result as a net-cost strategy
